title: Conducting Keyword Research for Answer Engine Optimization
excerpt: Traditional keyword research tools are falling behind. Learn how to identify the conversational queries and direct questions that fuel AEO and Voice Search.
author: Corey Spicer
content:
People don't speak to AI the way they type into a Google search bar. Instead of "plumber dallas," they ask, "Who is the best emergency plumber in Dallas who is open right now?"

Finding Conversational Queries

To optimize your videos for AEO, focus on long-tail, question-based keywords. Use tools like AnswerThePublic, AlsoAsked, and even analyze customer service transcripts to find the exact phrasing your customers use when looking for solutions.
